revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23127601988|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{ safesubst:<noinclude/>#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Broken anchor}} begin-->{{Fix | name = {{{name|Broken anchor}}} | link = MOS:BROKENSECTIONLINKS | text = broken anchor | date = {{{date|}}} | title = {{{reason|The target of this anchor is no longer exist.}}} | cat = {{main other|}} }}<!--{{Broken anchor}} end-->{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Broken anchor]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|ignoreblank=y| date | bot | reason | target_link }}}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES TO THE /doc SUBPAGE; INTERWIKIS GO TO WIKIDATA, THANK YOU! -->
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Pages with broken anchors]] [[Category:Pages containing broken anchor template with unsupported parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

{{ safesubst:<noinclude/>#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Broken anchor}} begin-->{{Fix | name = {{{name|Broken anchor}}} | link = MOS:BROKENSECTIONLINKS | text = broken anchor | date = {{{date|}}} | title = {{{reason|The target of this anchor is no longer exist.}}} | cat = {{main other|}} }}<!--{{Broken anchor}} end-->{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Broken anchor]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|ignoreblank=y| date | bot | reason | target_link }}}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES TO THE /doc SUBPAGE; INTERWIKIS GO TO WIKIDATA, THANK YOU! -->
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Pages with broken anchors]] [[Category:Pages containing broken anchor template with unsupported parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Broken_anchor here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Broken_anchor for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{ safesubst:<noinclude/>#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Broken anchor}} begin-->{{Fix | name = {{{name|Broken anchor}}} | link = MOS:BROKENSECTIONLINKS | text = broken anchor | date = {{{date|}}} | title = {{{reason|The target of this anchor is no longer exist.}}} | cat = {{main other|}} }}<!--{{Broken anchor}} end-->{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Broken anchor]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|ignoreblank=y| date | bot | reason | target_link }}}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES TO THE /doc SUBPAGE; INTERWIKIS GO TO WIKIDATA, THANK YOU! -->
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Pages with broken anchors]] [[Category:Pages containing broken anchor template with unsupported parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
